mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_likes WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id, p.title, p.addr1, p.first_image1, p.category_code1, p.category_code2, COUNT(pl2.user_id) AS like_count, true AS liked FROM places p JOIN place_likes pl ON p.place_id = pl.place_id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN place_likes pl2 ON p.place_id = pl2.place_id WHERE p.addr1 IS NOT NULL AND p.addr1 != '' GROUP BY p.place_id ORDER BY MIN(pl.created_at) DESC LIMIT #{limitSize} OFFSET #{offset}
